Browse and launch the r4clinstats lessons

Source: R/learn.R
learn.Rd

Lists the course modules and opens one as an interactive tutorial in your browser. With no argument it shows the menu; pass a module id (for example "m3" or 3) to go straight there.

Usage

learn(module = NULL)

Arguments

module

Optional module id, such as "m3". If NULL, the modules are listed and (in an interactive session) you are offered a menu.

Value

Invisibly NULL. Called for the side effect of launching a tutorial.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
learn()        # list the modules
learn("m3")    # open Wrangling I
} # }

On this page
